case_title: KIM NGUYEN VS. MARIO CABRAL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM AS TO DEFENDANT CABRAL, MARIO MACHADO, ROSA PARTS WAREHOUSE DISTRIBUTORS SAMERS, VLADIMIR UNITED CAB COMPANY DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-14-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-13-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-29-2004
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-06-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER REQUESTING EXTENSION OF TIME IN WHICH TO SERVE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; DECLARATION OF WILLIAM C. KWONG IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR EXTENSION TO SERVE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM
ORDER GRANTING EXTENSION OF TIME IN WHICH TO SERVE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANTS TO APRIL 30, 2004.
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-14-2004 CONTINUED TO JUN-25-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212,. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-09-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-25-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-09-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
